_notes: European Union membership as of May 2026: 27 member states. Croatia (2013) is the most recent accession; Brexit removed the United Kingdom in January 2020 and it is correctly absent. Candidate countries (Albania, Moldova, Montenegro, North Macedonia, Serbia, Türkiye, Ukraine, etc.) are NOT included — only full members.
Update procedure: edit the members list and bump _generated.
